screen_ctrl_enable_instruction: Enable Remote Control in the App (Settings \u2192 Remote Control), then grant the Accessibility Service permission.
screen_ctrl_sec1_desc: Each bot binding generates a unique botSecret scoped to your device. Even if multiple users share the same bot, each bot session can only access the device it was bound to \u2014 using another user\u2019s credentials will result in a 403 error.
screen_ctrl_sec2_desc: The bot sees a structured list of UI elements (text, buttons, input fields) \u2014 not a screenshot of your screen. Sensitive visuals (images, videos, drawing canvas) are never captured.
screen_ctrl_sec3_desc: Remote Control is off by default. You can disable it at any time in App Settings \u2192 Remote Control. Revoking the bot binding immediately invalidates its botSecret.
screen_ctrl_empty_state: Click \"Capture Screen\" to see the current UI tree from the device.
screen_ctrl_opt_tap: tap \u2014 Tap an element or coordinate
screen_ctrl_opt_type: type \u2014 Type text into a field
screen_ctrl_label_node_id: Node ID (from tree above, e.g. n3)
